_comment: Full sweep for Phase 2 (Task 2D.11). 6 FH params + 6 vortical params, ~3^6 x 5^3 = 91125 raw points, but FH sanity rules cut it heavily; expect 50000-70000 points. Per-point cost ~0.5 s on cpu-xl gives ~7-10 hours estimated; truncate to ~$5 budget by keeping the FH grid coarser (3 per axis) and the vortical grid moderate (3 per amplitude axis x 3 profile axes). Headline metric: any (V_Ax, V_Ay, V_Az) configuration that produces passenger_zone_radius > h AND strict WEC+DEC pass.
